description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single build stage containing a build_project job. Use the default runner image and include a before_script that runs 'carthage bootstrap'. In the build stage, the job should execute 'xcodebuild clean -project NoMADLogin-AD.xcodeproj -scheme NoMADLoginAD | xcpretty' followed by 'xcodebuild -project NoMADLogin-AD.xcodeproj -scheme NoMADLoginAD | xcpretty -s', and archive all untracked files as artifacts. No caches, services, variables, or conditional rules are required.
